Component.Name: PrintItemCustomerItemCombo
Component.Caption: sPrintItemorCustomerItem
Component.DefaultFrom: Sortby4VarNoAutoComp(IC, sItemThenCustomerItem, CI, sCustomerItemThenItem, C, sCustomerItem, I, sItem)

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(CoTypeRegular), VAR V(CoTypeBlanket), VAR V(OrderStarting), VAR V(OrderEnding), VAR V(SalespersonStarting), VAR V(SalespersonEnding), VAR V(Sortby), VAR V(CoStatus))

Variable.Name: RefType
Variable.Value: V(ReferenceTypeInventory) V(ReferenceTypeTransfer) V(ReferenceTypeCustomerOrder) V(ReferenceTypeJITProduction) V(ReferenceTypeProductionSchedule) V(ReferenceTypeRMA) V(ReferenceTypePurchaseOrder) V(ReferenceTypeWorkCenter) V(ReferenceTypeJob)

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If ThisForm.Variables("Sortby").Value = "S" And (lszCurSls <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("Slsman", linIndex) Or linIndex = 1) Then
If lboDupSls And linIndex > linStart + 1 Then Exit For
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For
If ThisForm.Variables("Sortby").Value = "S" And (lszCurSls <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("Slsman", linIndex) Or linIndex = 1) Then
If lboDupSls And linIndex > linStart + 1 Then Exit For
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For
' This method is triggered by the GenerateBackGroundReport event. That event is called from the
' Background Queue form when the form variable, "NoOfReports" (populated in the SetNoOfReports method),
' is greater than zero. Therefore, this method executes "NoOfReports" times when submitted via the Background
' form (if NoOfReports is zero then GenerateProfile is executed). This method is exactly the same as
' GenerateProfile report except Submit only occurs when the incrementing form variable, "ActualCount" is equal to
' The CollectionRefresh is unnecessary as it is done in SetNoOfReports
If ThisForm.Variables("Sortby").Value = "S" And (lszCurSls <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("Slsman", linIndex) Or linIndex = 1) Then
If lboDupSls And linIndex > linStart + 1 Then Exit For
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For
Function CheckSlsDup(ByVal pIndex As Integer) As Boolean
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("Slsman", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("Slsman", pIndex) Then Exit For
